'''Uru''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Uru system/Legends|Uru system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], and was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Oni]] [[Species/Legends|species]].{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1stm}}

*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
